name: phase4_minimal_closure_v1
purpose: Three high-value papers for Qwen staging extraction and regression testing.

selection_rationale.P001_Dubey_2012_FeMo_MgO_tMWCNT: Known three-run regression case with catalyst preparation, staged gas program, yield, Raman, TGA, and mixture caveats.
selection_rationale.P002_Chotmunkhongsin_2023_FeMo_MgO_H2_MW: Methane CVD study with hydrogen reduction/cofeed, kinetics, yield, and characterization.
selection_rationale.P006_Saetang_2024_NiMo_MgO_Biogas_CNT: Multiple temperatures and feed ratios with conversion, long-term stability, CNT quality, and scale-relevant evidence.
